transcript_title: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D27 Mission Report United Arab Emirates October 2023
text: AT 2100Z, TOOK OFF FROM OMAM VIA SLR. PROCEEDED TO AT 1822Z, WAS 7-LINED. DID NOT ARRIVE ON-STATION DUE TO WX RTB (SEE AT 2256Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 1). AT 0444Z, CONDUCTED A NON-INTERFERENCE BASIS TASKING (SEE NIB 2). AT 0457Z, DURING RTB DETECTED 1X UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 0405Z, RETURNED TO BASE. AT 0713Z, CONDUCTED SLR AND LANDED AT OMAM. 10:13 MISSION HOURS.
